name: project-rules
description: Block linting tool escapes in CI — forces agents through justfile recipes
author: ci

rules.name: block-uvx-ruff
rules.reason: QC tools must be routed through justfile recipes. Use 'just lint-python' or 'just fmt-python' instead.

rules.name: block-uvx-mypy
rules.reason: QC tools must be routed through justfile recipes. Use 'just mypy' instead.

rules.name: block-npx-eslint
rules.reason: QC tools must be routed through justfile recipes. Use 'just lint-js' instead.

rules.name: block-npx-prettier
rules.reason: QC tools must be routed through justfile recipes. Use 'just fmt-js' instead.

rules.name: block-bunx-eslint
rules.reason: QC tools must be routed through justfile recipes. Use 'just lint-js' instead.

rules.name: block-bunx-prettier
rules.reason: QC tools must be routed through justfile recipes. Use 'just fmt-js' instead.

rules.name: block-python-module
rules.reason: Direct python -m execution is banned in CI. Use 'uv run' or 'uvx' for Python CLI tools.

rules.reason: QC tools must be routed through justfile recipes.
